meaning: n.伦敦地下铁道,地下铁道
examples: A new metro runs under the square, carrying hundreds of thousands who used to cycle to work.
With the exception of South Africa, the only light rail metro system in sub-Saharan Africa is in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.
Living in France, I take the metro every day.
Public transport is excellent in Prague, with a well-integrated Metro, tram and bus system.
When the expansion is done, 2 million passengers are expected to use the metro daily.
